leads.issues: No meta description on the homepage (hurts click-through from Google), no LocalBusiness/healthcare schema markup, thin homepage copy ("A healthy mouth is the cornerstone of overall physical wellness" with no specifics on the practice), no patient testimonials or reviews shown on the homepage despite being an independent practice competing against corporate chains, and multiple banner images with no alt text.
leads.opportunity: Add local SEO schema and pull in real Google reviews on the homepage, and rewrite the hero copy around what actually differentiates an independent South Austin practice from the corporate chains nearby. Expected: meaningfully more "dentist near me" bookings within 60-90 days.
leads.email_subject: Your homepage has no meta description, Austin
leads.email_body:
Hi,

I was looking at ATX Family Dental's site today and noticed Google has nothing to show for you in search results — there's no meta description on your homepage, so when someone searches "dentist Austin 78704," Google just auto-generates a snippet (usually a bad one).

There's also no schema markup, so you're missing out on the star-rating and "open now" badges that corporate chains nearby already show.

I put together a quick page on exactly what I'd fix and why: https://organic-theory.vercel.app/leads/funnels/2026-07-10-atx-family-dental.html

No pressure either way, just thought it was worth flagging since it's a quick fix with a real upside.

Gabriel Balenton | Organic Theory Founder

leads.issues: Your homepage stat counters are showing literal placeholder zeros in production — "0 +" for Years Serving Ohio, "0 +" for Years Combined Experience, and "0" for Office Locations — visible to every visitor and every Google crawler right now. Hi,
